additionalPicker.label: Additional options
additionalPicker.tip: When calculating the route, try to avoid previously visited roads.

home.heroTitle: Visit every street in the selected city.
home.heroSubtitle: This is a demo app for my exploration of graph algorithms and maps.
home.heroDescription: Select a city from the list below. See how you could run through all the streets in the city.
home.section2Title: It is hard to visit every street in a city at once.
home.section2Description: This map lets you pick a distance and a starting point — it will prioritize streets that haven't been visited yet.
home.section2Note: You can import your data — nothing is stored on the server.

login.heading: Sign in
login.subtitle: Nice to see you again. Return to the map and generate new routes.

register.heading: Create account
register.subtitle: Join and discover new routes with travel‑map.
register.passwordHint: Min. 8 characters, upper/lowercase letter and a digit.
register.acceptTerms: I accept the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
register.successMessage: Account created. Check your email to confirm your address.

resetRequest.title: Reset password
resetRequest.intro: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
resetRequest.successGeneric: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

resetConfirm.title: Set a new password
resetConfirm.intro: Choose a strong password to secure your account.
resetConfirm.passwordHint: Min. 8 characters, upper/lowercase letter and a digit.
resetConfirm.success: Password changed. You can now sign in.

security.hint: Min. 8 characters, upper/lowercase letter and a digit.

danger.description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use travel‑map.

admin: The controller of your personal data is the operator of travel‑map. You can reach us using the contact details listed at the bottom of this page.
dataCategories: We process your email address and, if you connect them, data from third‑party services such as Google or Strava.
We also collect basic technical data (e.g. IP address, browser type) required for the site to function.
purposes: We use your data to provide the service, authenticate you, and improve the app.
legalBases: Depending on the type of data, processing is based on your consent, our legitimate interest, or the necessity to perform a contract.
retention: We keep your data for as long as your account is active, and afterwards only as required by law.
recipients: We only share data with providers strictly necessary to run the service (hosting, authentication). Route data stays on our server.
transfers: If any provider is located outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.
rights: You have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, or port your data, as well as to object to processing.
cookies: We use only essential cookies required for authentication and preferences (e.g. theme, language).
security: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
changes: We may update this policy. Significant changes will be announced in the app.
contact: Questions? Contact us using the details on the project page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using travel‑map you agree to these terms.

general: These terms govern your use of the travel‑map application and related services.
services: The app helps you plan and explore routes in selected cities. Availability may vary and features may change.
account: You are responsible for keeping your credentials safe and for activity that happens on your account.
content: You retain ownership of data you provide. You grant us a limited license to process it to provide the service.
liability: The service is provided as‑is. We are not liable for any indirect or consequential damages resulting from its use.
tech: A modern browser and an internet connection are required.
termination: You may delete your account at any time. We may suspend accounts violating these terms.
changes: We may change these terms. Continued use of the service means acceptance of the updated terms.
law: These terms are governed by the applicable law of the operator's jurisdiction.
contact: For questions about these terms, contact us via the project page.
